title: selaginella diffusa
intro: Selaginella diffusa, also known as spikemoss, is a type of evergreen epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Selaginella diffusa have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
